economic_notes: First Nation has initiated litigation for damages from Husky Oil spill and specific claims against Government of Canada. Litigation financing obtained with insurance coverage. Sweetgrass Developments Limited Partnership and Sweetgrass Investments Ltd. consolidated. New school construction and water treatment plant capital projects underway.
notes: Province is SK (Saskatchewan) - MNP office in Saskatoon. Auditor emphasis of matter paragraph regarding litigation financing for multiple claims (Husky Oil Spill, specific claims against Canada). Three consolidated subsidiaries: Sweetgrass First Nation CMHC Housing, Sweetgrass Developments Limited Partnership, Sweetgrass Investments Ltd. Sweetgrass Treaty Land Entitlement Trust and Sweetgrass Legacy Trust excluded from consolidation as not controlled. Large increase in restricted cash ($25.2M) and deferred revenue ($26.8M) due to capital project funding for new school ($16M contribution). ISC total calculated as net of deferred revenue adjustment. Total government transfers include ISC net ($18,320,540) plus CMHC ($344,374) plus Class Action Settlement ($387,171) = $19,052,085. Prior year had one-time items: Chief and Headperson Settlement proceeds of $2,634,605 offset by negotiation costs and per capita payments netting to $99,092 surplus impact. Asset retirement obligations relate to asbestos in buildings. Multiple litigation loans outstanding totalling ~$3.16M secured by insurance policies.
